name: Chocolate Ginger Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cookie crumbs with butter and pat into a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Bake at 350°F for 8 - 10 minutes.
3. In a small pot, bring whipping cream to a boil. Remove from heat and stir in bittersweet chocolate until melted; let cool.
4. Pour into pie shell and let set for 2 hours in the refrigerator.
5. Melt white chocolate separately.
6. Drizzle melted chocolate overtop the tart before serving.
